text.title: AI-Generated Test Validation Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from raw input to validated ai-generated-test-validation artefact.

step.name: inventory
step.action: Collect all AI-generated tests; count by file.

step.name: static-rules
step.action: AST scan: detect mirror-test (function under test name re-implemented), mock-of-SUT (mock target overlap), no-assertion tests.

step.name: mutation-run
step.action: Run mutation-testing tool (mutmut / pitest / Stryker). Record mutation_survival = killed / total.

step.name: triage
step.action: For each survivor, identify which test should have caught it; mark assertion-drift if the test never fails.
step.output: Final rejection list with rule_violated per item

step.name: report
step.action: Emit TVR-* report. verdict=pass if mutation_survival >= 0.70; otherwise verdict=rework.
step.decision-gate: mutation_survival < 0.70 → verdict=rework regardless of rejection count.
